properties.name: ogiri.security.register-filter
properties.description: Enable automatic registration of the ogiri SecurityFilterChain bean.

properties.name: ogiri.auth.register-token-service
properties.description: Enable auto-registration of the default OgiriTokenService.

properties.name: ogiri.auth.max-clients
properties.description: Maximum number of active APP tokens per user. Oldest tokens are revoked when limit is exceeded.

properties.name: ogiri.auth.batch-grace-seconds
properties.description: Grace period (seconds) for detecting batch requests. Prevents token thrashing from rapid consecutive requests.

properties.name: ogiri.auth.token-lifespan-days
properties.description: Default token lifetime in days for new APP tokens.

properties.name: ogiri.auth.rotate-on-write-only
properties.description: Only rotate tokens on mutating HTTP requests (POST, PUT, DELETE, PATCH). GET requests update lastUsedAt but do not trigger rotation.

properties.name: ogiri.auth.rotate-stale-seconds
properties.description: Force token rotation if token exceeds this age (seconds). Set to 0 to disable staleness-based rotation.

properties.name: ogiri.auth.max-bearer-token-size
properties.description: Maximum allowed size for bearer tokens in bytes. Prevents memory exhaustion attacks.

properties.name: ogiri.cleanup.enabled
properties.description: Enable the scheduled OgiriTokenCleanupJob for automatic expired token deletion.

properties.name: ogiri.cleanup.interval-ms
properties.description: Interval in milliseconds between cleanup job executions.

properties.name: ogiri.cleanup.batch-size
properties.description: Batch size for token cleanup operations. Tokens are deleted in batches to avoid overwhelming the database.

properties.name: ogiri.cookies.enabled
properties.description: Enable setting authentication cookies in responses.

properties.name: ogiri.cookies.secure
properties.description: Set the Secure flag on cookies. When true, cookies are only sent over HTTPS.

properties.name: ogiri.cookies.http-only
properties.description: Set the HttpOnly flag on cookies. When true, cookies are not accessible via JavaScript.

properties.name: ogiri.cookies.same-site
properties.description: SameSite attribute for cookies. Controls when cookies are sent with cross-site requests.

properties.name: ogiri.cache.max-size
properties.description: Maximum number of token comparison results to cache.

properties.name: ogiri.cache.expiry-minutes
properties.description: Time in minutes before cached token comparison results expire.

values.description: Only sent with same-site requests (most secure)
Sent with same-site and top-level navigation
